game.name: W.A.R H.A.M.S
game.theme: Sci-fi corporate military conquest on alien planets
game.tagline: Competing corporate armies fight for planetary dominance through resource control, tactical combat, and political conspiring

victory_conditions.name: Spaceport Domination
victory_conditions.description: Control 4 of 6 space ports — HQ sends a full battalion, rivals can't resupply and flee off-world
victory_conditions.requirement: Control 4 of the 6 spaceport landing zones

victory_conditions.name: Military Supremacy
victory_conditions.description: Have 4 full squads of 7 soldiers — competition's HQs pull them back
victory_conditions.requirement: 4 squads with 7 soldiers each (28 total soldiers)

victory_conditions.name: Dominance Victory
victory_conditions.description: Local population sides with you — you become sovereign
victory_conditions.requirement: Accumulate 50 Dominance Points from equipped BACs

number_tokens.note: Numbers 1 & 2 are scarcer (2 tokens each), 3-6 have 3 tokens each. Placed on 15 resource-producing hexes only (one hex gets 2 tokens). Separatist Bases and Spaceports have printed numbers on the tile.

board.shape: Circular planet frame (5 interlocking cardboard puzzle pieces), 61 hexes fill the entire interior. Edge connection points (a, b, c, etc.) enable board wrapping — opposite edges are adjacent.

resources.name: Oil
resources.token: Oil Drum (black on white, black border)

resources.name: Electricity
resources.token: Lightning Bolt (yellow on white, yellow border)

resources.name: Intelligence
resources.token: Transmitting Wave (blue on white, blue border)

special_tiles.name: Separatist Base
special_tiles.mechanics: Each base has a printed number (2, 4, or 6). Spawns 3 separatists only when the Separatist Die (grey d6) matches the base number (if insufficient minis remain, spawn as many as possible — excess lost). Once captured, stops natural spawning. Conquering requires defeating 7 separatists. Controller may Instigate Uprising (Phase 7): pay 3 Local Favor to spawn 3 Separatists at any unconquered base (once per round per conquered base). All 3 bases captured: produce 1 Local Favor when number rolled.

special_tiles.name: Spaceport Drop Zone
special_tiles.mechanics: Each spaceport has a printed number (1–6). BACs land here on doubles matching the printed number. Can be captured for passive BAC collection.

bac_setup.description: Deal 3 BAC cards to each player. Each player picks 1, passes 2 left. Picks 1 from received cards, passes 1 left. Keeps the final card. Result: 3-card starting hand.

turn_phases.name: Resource Production
turn_phases.description: Roll 2d6 + 1 Separatist Die (grey). All 3 dice produce resources. Only the Separatist Die triggers spawning at bases. Doubles = BAC from Planet Bound Area to matching spaceport. Triples = active player chooses spaceport placement + may move 1 Planet Bound BAC.

turn_phases.name: Movement
turn_phases.description: Move squads 1 hex (2 with Jump Jets). Each soldier moves independently but must stay within 2 hexes of at least one squadmate (squad coherency). Skip movement to Conspire instead.

turn_phases.name: Combat
turn_phases.description: Initiate combat with enemies within 1-2 hexes. See combat system.

turn_phases.name: Resource Gathering
turn_phases.description: Active player collects resources from same/adjacent hex. If combat occurred, defending player(s) also collect. Winner picks first, then loser. If no combat, only active player collects. BEAR card allows +1 pickup.

turn_phases.name: Purchase & Equip
turn_phases.description: Buy upgrades with resources. Each squad can hold X armaments where X = number of soldiers.

turn_phases.name: Move Separatists
turn_phases.description: Instigate Uprising first (conquered base owners may pay 3 Local Favor to spawn 3 Separatists at an unconquered base, once per base per round). Then separatists: consume resources, move toward produced resources, or roll for random direction. If a Separatist enters a player-occupied hex, immediate combat triggers (player defends, Separatist attacks with -1 dice).

combat_system.attack_defense_rolls: Each player rolls 1d6 per engaged soldier (within 2 hexes of enemy). Soldiers outside range sit out. Attacker assigns dice to defender's soldiers. Defender aligns defense dice.
combat_system.more_soldiers_advantage: Extra dice are rolled but only best are chosen, giving advantage
combat_system.engagement_range: Only soldiers within 2 hexes of at least one enemy soldier in the target squad participate. S.L.I.M.E (mortar, 3 hex range) counts as engaged from beyond normal range. B.A.S.R (sniper, 2 hex) fires in pre-combat at normal engagement range; range extendable to 4 hexes via L.P.M.
combat_system.bonuses: Add equipment bonuses after initial roll
combat_system.card_play: Defender plays combat cards first, then attacker
combat_system.damage_resolution: Difference in dice = damage tokens. Soldier takes 3 damage max, 4th = death.
combat_system.counterattack: Defending blocks with +3 or more difference trigger counterattack (defender becomes attacker). Counterattacks can chain but each successive chain suffers cumulative -1 Combat Fatigue penalty to all dice rolls (1st counter: no penalty, 2nd: -1, 3rd: -2, etc.)

module_activation.combat_modules: Activate during combat resolution at Step 3 (equipment bonuses). E.g., N.I.N.J.A.
module_activation.field_modules: Activate during Phase 5 (Purchase & Equip). E.g., P.L.A.S.T.E.R, D.U.D.S.
module_activation.untapping: Phase 5, at required location (City/Spaceport), pay recharge cost.
module_activation.passive: Always active, no activation needed (H.C.A.R, S.A.P, etc.)

death.lethal_hit_roll: d6 determines which slot was hit (1=head, 2=backpack, 3=legs, 4-5=chest, 6=hands)
death.destroyed_module: Module in hit slot is destroyed (removed from game)
death.salvage: Owner picks 1 remaining module, attacker picks 1, rest left on hex as salvage (picked up for free by any soldier)
death.coherency_check: After death, check if surviving squadmates are beyond 2 hexes from all allies. Disconnected soldiers fight alone (own dice only, no Squad-level BAC effects) and must rejoin coherency next Movement phase.

squad_details.new_soldier_cost: 1 Local Favor + 1 Oil + 1 Industry + 1 Electricity (must be in/near city)

squad_coherency.rule: Every soldier must remain within 2 hexes of at least one other squadmate at all times
squad_coherency.exception: J.J (Jump Jets) may override coherency. Disconnected soldiers fight alone (own dice only) and cannot benefit from Squad-level BAC effects. May rejoin by moving back within 2 hexes.

basic_armament_cards.name: Standard Armor Plating Chest Piece
basic_armament_cards.text: Gain +1 for one defense die.

basic_armament_cards.name: Standard Armor Plating Helmet
basic_armament_cards.text: Gain +1 for one defense die.

basic_armament_cards.name: Standard Armor Plating Legs
basic_armament_cards.text: Gain +1 for one defense die.

basic_armament_cards.name: Jump Jets
basic_armament_cards.text: This soldier can move 2 hexes instead of 1. May override squad coherency — fights alone while disconnected (own dice only, no Squad-level BAC effects). Rejoin by moving within 2 hexes of a squadmate.

basic_armament_cards.name: Sensory Helmet, Advisory Drone
basic_armament_cards.text: If attacked, before combat starts, attacking player must reveal his conspire cards to you.

basic_armament_cards.name: Heavy Caliber Assault Rifle
basic_armament_cards.text: Add +1 to this soldier's attack die.

basic_armament_cards.name: Personal Accuracy Enhancement Helmet
basic_armament_cards.text: Gain +1 to your attack die if you also carry an HCAR.

basic_armament_cards.name: Bolt Action Sniper Rifle
basic_armament_cards.text: On your turn, before combat, throw 2 dice and choose a target soldier up to 2 hexes away. Target defends normally. Attacking soldier skips normal combat. While defending: -1 to defense die.

basic_armament_cards.name: Squad Light Interoperable Mortar Encampment
basic_armament_cards.text: Choose 2 soldiers to carry SLIME. Throw 4 dice, target squad up to 3 hexes away. Target defends normally. Attacking soldiers skip normal combat. Defenders get -1 to all defense dice. While defending: -1 to defense die.
basic_armament_cards.special: Requires 2 soldiers. Civilian damage penalty on Local Favor hexes.

basic_armament_cards.name: Battlefield Extraction Airlift Rover
basic_armament_cards.text: During resource gathering, after picking your resource, choose 1 more resource token of any kind.

basic_armament_cards.name: Personal Lasting Aid Surgical Treatment Enhancement Robot
basic_armament_cards.text: Remove up to 2 damage tokens. Tap this card. When in city or spaceport, pay 1 Electricity to recharge and untap.

basic_armament_cards.name: Nir Ion Nullifier Jammer Aid
basic_armament_cards.text: Add +3 to one defense die and tap this card. Spend 2 Electricity to recharge and untap.

basic_armament_cards.name: Deployable Unital Defense System
basic_armament_cards.text: Place a bunker token on this hex (1 per hex max). +1 to all defense dice for any unit on this hex (neutral fortification). Bunker persists until destroyed by attacker winning combat on it. Flip this card (one-use).

basic_armament_cards.name: Laser Pointer Marker
basic_armament_cards.text: Other soldiers carrying B.A.S.R or S.L.I.M.E can target enemies in vicinity of L.P.M carrier. Max range 4 hexes.

basic_armament_cards.name: Repeating Shotgun
basic_armament_cards.text: If target squad is up to 1 hex away, add +2 to attack die. Otherwise add -1.

basic_armament_cards.name: Projectile Correcting Sub Machine Gun
basic_armament_cards.text: If target squad is up to 1 hex away, roll 2d6 for this soldier's attack instead of 1d6 and pick the higher result.

basic_armament_cards.name: Custom Armor Plating Chest
basic_armament_cards.text: Gain +2 for one defense die.

basic_armament_cards.name: Custom Armor Plating Helmet
basic_armament_cards.text: Gain +2 for one defense die.

basic_armament_cards.name: Custom Armor Plating Legs
basic_armament_cards.text: Gain +2 for one defense die.

basic_armament_cards.name: Tactical Ion Team Link Shield
basic_armament_cards.text: Pay cost once, choose X soldiers in squad — all get TILTS backpack free. While defending, swap attacker's dice between TILTS soldiers. No other backpack allowed with TILTS.

conspire_cards.name: Deal with Local Militia
conspire_cards.text: Choose a hex up to 2 hexes from your soldier. Spawn 3 local militia to attack a nearby enemy immediately. Militia have -1 to all dice and disperse after attack.

conspire_cards.name: A Rough Night
conspire_cards.text: Choose a squad anywhere on the board. Immobilized AND -1 to combat rolls for next turn.

conspire_cards.name: Traveling Med Bay
conspire_cards.text: Exchange any 1 resource to heal 1 damage token. Up to 3 damage tokens.

conspire_cards.name: Deal with a Local Representative
conspire_cards.text: Conspire again, keep 2 conspire cards.

conspire_cards.name: Abandoned Satellite Control Station
conspire_cards.text: Exchange 1 Electricity for 3 Intelligence.

conspire_cards.name: Build a Wind Farm
conspire_cards.text: Exchange 1 Industry for 3 Electricity.

conspire_cards.name: Raid an Oil Cache
conspire_cards.text: Exchange 1 Intelligence for 3 Oil.

conspire_cards.name: Factory Takeover
conspire_cards.text: Exchange 1 Local Favor for 3 Industry.

conspire_cards.name: Build a Follower Camp
conspire_cards.text: Exchange 1 Industry for 3 Local Favor.

conspire_cards.name: Hack a PortNet Relay
conspire_cards.text: Take 1 face-up BAC from the Planet Bound Area into your hand. Immediately refill the empty slot from the Spaceport Deck.

conspire_cards.name: Recruit Eager Volunteers
conspire_cards.text: Gain 1 Local Favor. Roll 1d6: on 5-6, gain 1 additional resource token of any type you choose.

conspire_cards.name: Scout Ahead
conspire_cards.text: Gain 1 Intelligence. Roll 1d6: on 5-6, gain 1 additional resource token of any type you choose.

conspire_cards.name: Tap into Oil Reserves
conspire_cards.text: Gain 1 Oil. Roll 1d6: on 5-6, gain 1 additional resource token of any type you choose.

conspire_cards.name: Proper Planning
conspire_cards.text: Gain 1 Industry. Roll 1d6: on 5-6, gain 1 additional resource token of any type you choose.

conspire_cards.name: Tap into the Local Power Grid
conspire_cards.text: Gain 1 Electricity. Roll 1d6: on 5-6, gain 1 additional resource token of any type you choose.

conspire_cards.name: Guerrilla Warfare
conspire_cards.text: Add 1d6 die to an attack combat roll of your choosing.

conspire_cards.name: Defender Instant Shield
conspire_cards.text: Add 1d6 to a defensive combat roll of your choosing.

conspire_cards.name: Old School RPG
conspire_cards.text: Add +1 to an attack combat roll.

conspire_cards.name: One Pulse Barrier
conspire_cards.text: Add +1 to a defense combat roll.

conspire_cards.name: Knowledge is Power
conspire_cards.text: If you control 2/3 of Intelligence-producing tiles, gain 2 BACs from spaceport deck.

conspire_cards.name: Civilian Goods Transport
conspire_cards.text: If you control 2/3 of Local Favor-producing tiles, gain any 4 resource tokens.

conspire_cards.name: Black Gold Syndicate
conspire_cards.text: If you control 2/3 of Oil-producing tiles, gain 2 Conspire cards.

conspire_cards.name: At the Cover of Darkness
conspire_cards.text: If you control 2/3 of Electricity-producing tiles, choose a player and steal: (1) 2 random resource tokens, (2) 1 random Conspire card, or (3) 1 random BAC from their hand.

conspire_cards.name: Factory Cost Savings
conspire_cards.text: If you control 2/3 of Industry-producing tiles, play a BAC without paying cost for 2 soldiers. May pay cost for the rest.

components_summary.squad_boards: 16 (4 per player x 4 players). Each player starts with 2, additional boards earned during play.
components_summary.soldier_miniatures: 112 player (4 colors x 28) + 24 separatist greys. Each player mini has magnetized attachment points for 5 equipment slots.
components_summary.equipment_modules: 160 total (20 types x 8 copies). Physical magnetized parts with unique sculpts and abbreviation engraved on underside. Destroyed modules return to the box for re-purchase.
components_summary.control_flags: 25 per player, 4 colors (100 total). Used for hex control and Equipment Display tracking. Flags on Equipment Display are permanent — never removed once placed, even if all soldiers carrying that module die. Marks unlocked BAC types for re-equipping
components_summary.bunker_tokens: several — neutral fortifications: +1 all defense dice on hex, 1 per hex max, any unit benefits, destroyed by attacker winning combat
